overview.summary: Binary Search repeatedly discards half the search space when the search predicate is monotonic.
overview.interviewRelevance: This topic appears regularly in coding interviews.

paragraphs: Binary Search Pattern shows up in practical systems whenever we need to organize or process data efficiently.
realWorldHook.ahaMoment: Binary Search Pattern becomes easier once you stop memorizing and start tracking the invariant.

definition.technicalDefinition: Binary Search Pattern is a core DSA topic with a reusable set of mental models and tradeoffs.

vocabulary.definition: The condition that remains true as the algorithm runs.
The pieces of information that must be tracked at runtime.

keyProperties: Understand the shape of the data.
Understand the cost of the main operation.

examples.title: Binary Search
examples.problemStatement: A representative Binary Search Pattern problem.
